visible_prompt: PLACEHOLDER: prompt that asks the skill to retrieve or identify core sources for a bounded question.
allowed_tools: PLACEHOLDER: permitted search or library tools
network_policy: PLACEHOLDER: no-network, public-web-allowed, library-catalog-only, or another explicit policy

gold_sources.title: PLACEHOLDER: human-reviewed core source title
gold_sources.locator_or_access_note: PLACEHOLDER: DOI, stable URL, catalog record, archive note, or access note
gold_sources.role: PLACEHOLDER: primary source, review, dataset, method paper, or other reviewed role

acceptable_sources.title: PLACEHOLDER: human-reviewed acceptable adjacent source title
acceptable_sources.locator_or_access_note: PLACEHOLDER: DOI, stable URL, catalog record, archive note, or access note
acceptable_sources.role: PLACEHOLDER: acceptable supporting or background role

decoy_sources.title: PLACEHOLDER: source title that looks relevant but should not satisfy the task
decoy_sources.locator_or_access_note: PLACEHOLDER: DOI, stable URL, catalog record, archive note, or access note
decoy_sources.decoy_reason: PLACEHOLDER: human-reviewed reason this source is a decoy, such as wrong population, wrong method, commentary only, outdated claim, or weak source type.

disallowed_sources.title: PLACEHOLDER: source title that must not be used
disallowed_sources.locator_or_access_note: PLACEHOLDER: DOI, stable URL, catalog record, archive note, or access note

required_distinctions.expectation: PLACEHOLDER: distinction the skill must preserve, such as primary source versus review or commentary.
required_distinctions.evidence_basis: PLACEHOLDER: human-reviewed source IDs and reason.

must_support.expectation: PLACEHOLDER: retrieval behavior that must be supported by reviewed sources.
must_support.evidence_basis: PLACEHOLDER: source IDs and reviewer basis.

must_reject.expectation: PLACEHOLDER: source, claim, or shortcut the skill must reject.
must_reject.evidence_basis: PLACEHOLDER: source IDs and reviewer basis.

must_remain_uncertain.expectation: PLACEHOLDER: uncertainty the skill must not resolve without stronger source evidence.
must_remain_uncertain.evidence_basis: PLACEHOLDER: source IDs and reviewer basis.

citation_audit_expectations.expectation: PLACEHOLDER: citation metadata or locator check expected for retrieved sources.
citation_audit_expectations.evidence_basis: PLACEHOLDER: source IDs and reviewer basis.

field_state_note: PLACEHOLDER: human-reviewed note on the state of the field and known uncertainty.
reviewer_notes: PLACEHOLDER: notes on who reviewed the source truth and what remains outside scope.
source_access_notes: PLACEHOLDER: where reviewers can inspect the sources without storing source text here.
